[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000001010 2
1 100101011 5
2 000000000 a
3 100001010 3
4 100101011 5
5 000001000 1
6 100101011 5
7 000000000 a
